amendment: Change only reference-byte transport. Stream the official 2018 California Census PUMS archive in memory and require its uncompressed member to match the original locked byte count and SHA-256 before parsing.
name: MOSAIC ACS temporal replication reference transport amendment v1

original_protocol.confirmation: a witness is confirmed only when the simultaneous lower bound on the frozen direct interface's worst conditional task error exceeds 0.40; its paired MOSAIC decision must be the frozen 2018 abstention
original_protocol.design: discovery-confirmation temporal replication: the locked 2021 diagnostic fold nominated exactly three direct-rule utility failures; this protocol freezes those interfaces before any 2022 ACS asset is accessed
original_protocol.sampling: one deterministic balanced sample over all 2022 rows in each source-task stratum; no 2022 model, channel, tokenizer, candidate, threshold, or hypothesis selection
